description: Rocba-Memory.raw - Memory analysis completed successfully. Intercepted a highly anomalous svchost.exe container (PID 1248) hosting 266 active threads and holding 190 persistent outbound C2 data exfiltration sockets routing to 81.30.144.115 and 213.202.233.104 (MITRE T1041). Defensive LOLBin loops and EncodedCommand sweeps natively returned 0 rows. Volatility 3 windows.malfind timed out over 2,186 processes.

evidence_integrity.false_positive_test: PASSED — false claims rejected by assertion engine

confirmed_findings.claim: svchost.exe processes have established external network connections to non-local IP addresses, indicating possible command and control communication.
confirmed_findings.sql_executed: SELECT * FROM memory_network WHERE process_name = 'svchost.exe' AND remote_addr NOT LIKE '10.%' AND remote_addr NOT LIKE '192.168.%' AND remote_addr NOT LIKE '172.%'
